About: It is about an international motorsport event.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Formula One.
It is associated with World Rally Championship.
It is associated with sports car racing.
It is associated with touring car racing.
It is associated with motorcycle racing.
ConsistsOf: It consists of teams of two drivers.
It consists of three runs in the final.
It consists of a round-robin format.
It consists of a knockout tournament.
CreatedBy: It was created by former rally driver Michèle Mouton.
It was created by Fredrik Johnsson.
CreatedTo: It was created to celebrate the tenth anniversary of the world championship for rally drivers.
HasA: It has the title "Champion of Champions".
It has the Henri Toivonen Memorial Trophy.
It has the ROC Nations' Cup.
It has a ROC Car buggy.
It has the KTM X-Bow.
It has the Audi R8 LMS.
It has the Lamborghini Gallardo SuperTrofeo.
It has the VW Scirocco R-Cup.
It has the NASCAR European Stock Car.
It has the FIA RX2e.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by featuring some of the world's best racing and rally drivers.
It is characterized by competitors competing against each other in identical cars.
It is characterized by the introduction of the ROC Nations' Cup.
It is characterized by the use of stadium-based tracks.
It is characterized by the use of identical machines for each driver.
It is characterized by the use of different cars over the course of the event.
It is characterized by the use of fossil-free biofuel.
HeldIn: It was held in Gran Canaria.
It was held in the Stade de France in Paris.
It was held in Wembley Stadium in London.
It was held in the Beijing National Stadium.
It was held in Düsseldorf's ESPRIT arena.
It was held in the Rajamangala Stadium in Bangkok.
It was held in Olympic Stadium.
It was held in the Marlins Park in Miami.
It was held in the King Fahd International Stadium in Riyadh.
